testcase.name: test_data_coverage_endpoint_returns_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_p2p3_features.py:27: in test_data_coverage_endpoint_returns_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_p2p3_features.py:34: in test_data_coverage_has_by_tier assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
